Calm Balm

✓ In Stock

Calm your mind and ease tension with lavender; rosemary and peppermint essential oil; perfect for a relaxing massage or nightly ritual to promote tranquility

Product Options

Ingredients

Lavender, Rosemary and Peppermint Essential Oil

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Ingredients

Lavender and Chamomile

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
